chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 241 of 2019 ________________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________________________ For hearing of main petition. 26th August, 2019 Mr. Aziz-ur-Rehman Akhund, Advocate for petitioner. ====================== This petition seeking the issuance of Letters of Administration has been filed in connection with the estates of the deceased Arif Moosa and Mst. Amina Bibi wife of Arif Moosa, who expired on 22.09.2018 and 20.02.2015 respectively. According to the petition, the deceased have left behind the following legal heirs: Muhammad Arif (petitioner) Son Muhammad Saleem Arif Son Muhammad Amin Arif Son Mrs. Sherbano Farooq Daughter Ms. Mumtaz Arif Daughter The note of the Deputy Registrar (OS) dated 30-5-2019 shows that all formalities have been completed. The witnesses are present in Court today in person and confirm the contents of the petition. All the legal heirs have sworn their Affidavits of No Objection in favour of the petitioner. This is not a contested matter and no objections have been received to date after publication. In view of the foregoing there appears to be no impediment to issue Letters of Administration. Office to do the needful subject to rules. JUDGE

Office to do the needful subject to rules. JUDGE ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 246 of 2019 ________________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________________________ For hearing of main petition. 26th August, 2019 Mr. Aziz-ur-Rehman Akhund, Advocate for petitioner. ====================== This petition seeking the issuance of a Letter of Administration has been filed in connection with the estate of the deceased Syed Aminuddin, who expired on 22.03.2005. According to the petition, the deceased has left behind the following legal heirs: Syed Muhammad Mashood (petitioner) Son Munem Mahmood Ghaznavi Son Ms. Danish Ara Daughter Ms. Sarwar Jehan Daughter Syed Muhammad Monqush Son Ms. Sarwat Ara Daughter The note of the Deputy Registrar (OS) dated 30-5-2019 shows that all formalities have been completed. The witnesses are present in Court today in person and confirm the contents of the petition. Legal heirs Munem Mahmood Ghaznavi, Sarwar Jehan and Sarwat Ara are also present in person whereas Syed Muhammad Monqush has executed power of attorney in favour of petitioner. Legal heir Ms. Danish Ara has also sworn an Affidavit of No Objection in favour of the petitioner before Assistant Registrar, Affidavit & Identity Branch, High Court, Karachi. This is not a contested matter and no objections have been received to date after publication. In view of the foregoing there appears to be no impediment to issue a Letter of Administration. Office to do the needful subject to rules. JUDGE
